Great Houses[ ]

  • Targaryen of King's Landing
  • Stark of Winterfell
  • Lannister of Casterly Rock
  • Arryn of the Eyrie

  • Greyjoy of Pyke
  • Baratheon of Storm's End
  • Tyrell of Highgarden
  • Martell of Sunspear
